prompt: Tap flop left to anchor medium-stack context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_left is the board anchor, so the tournament read starts from the first card that frames the flop texture.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left flop card is the target board card because the medium-stack context begins from that first board cue.
